form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after seven months 4th of 12 at this track on March 29 over 1600m, on a wet track; 5 len behind Crefelder with 57kg at $10.80. Previously second-up 4th of 10 at Cologne on June 9 over 1600m, slow going 4 len behind Crocus carrying 66.5kg at $23.60. Fitter and worth including.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of seven months. Has placed previously first up from a break.
